name: streamer-copilot
description: Desktop app for streamers with unified chat and automations
author: Paulo Manrique

scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 dist/main/index.js dist/preload/index.cjs && nodemon --watch dist/main --watch dist/preload --exec "electron dist/main/index.js"
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && npm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --linux
